chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.39 of 2022 Jamil Ahmed Khan Versus Muhammad Ahmed Siddiqui & another Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal (As office objections not complied with as yet) (Duplicate set not provided) Dated: 19.12.2023 None present. -.-.- This matter is coming up for non-prosecution for quite some time and only one set of file is placed before this Bench hence both of us are compelled to look into the main file and to peruse the order sheets of previous dates. Appellant and his counsel are not interested either in complying with the office objections or the orders passed by this Court. No one is even appearing on behalf of the appellants for the last two dates. Same is the position today. There is no intimation either. It seems that they are not interested in pursuing this matter and consequently we have no alternate but to dismiss this appeal for non-prosecution. Order accordingly. Judge Judge
